// STANDOFF (DUEL) - Western Gunfight
// Seven duels. Six bullets. Wait or draw.
// Applesoft Lite (P-LAB microSD) - 2954 bytes
// Usage: 6000R (cold start), paste this, then 6003R, RUN
//
// Set TXTTAB=$0801, VARTAB/STREND=$138B
